'''Shaara''' was the daughter of [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmers]] who, at the age of fifteen, performed a "[[Droid/Legends|droid]]" act wrapped in [[kelsh]] in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on the edge of [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] owned by [[Dakkar the Distant]].

She had two brothers, one named [[Kamma]] and [[Unidentified skiff guard|another]], three years her junior, who became a [[Skiff guard/Legends|skiff guard]] for [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

Shaara was chased from her workplace by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] who had been allowed back stage by the owner, and across the [[Dune Sea/Legends|Dune Sea]], where she and the stormtroopers fell into the [[Great Pit of Carkoon/Legends|Great Pit of Carkoon]]. The Imperials all succumbed to the hunger of the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]]. The tentacled creature, however, mysteriously threw the girl back out to safety.
